name: PiMon
short_description: PiMon are virtual pets that live right on your PC! Take care of your PiMon while you do your daily tasks. Train them, update them into new forms, raise PiMon together or battle with your friends. Or do none of that and raise your PiMon your way! Welcome Admin, what kind of PiMon will you raise?
detailed_description:
"Through the advancement of technology we have discovered a new type of lifeform, Personal-computer Integrated Monsters, or PiMon for short. We are yet to determine how long they have existed, or how they came to be. They just seemed to have appeared as a digital egg that appeared on a desktop screen someday. What seems to be evident is that advancements in computer technologies have allowed them to finally reveal themselves to us.

-And that is where you come in.

You have been chosen as a PiMon admin. Befriend, take care of, and play with your very own PiMon. And together, we can uncover the many mysteries of these enigmatic creatures!" - Prof. Pikon

                                                                                                                                                        

PiMon only take a small portion of your screen. They have their own rooms. You can move these rooms to the top, bottom, or anywhere on your screen. You can even make the screen larger or smaller!

                                                                                                                                                        

Want to interact with your PiMon more directly? Play games with your PiMon or just pet and comb its fur using the Active Play feature!

                                                                                                                                                        

You can also test your Pimon's might against your friend's in thrilling PvP battles through Steam's Remote Play Together feature or other screen sharing tools!

                                                                                                                                                        

Your PiMon can update and evolve into new versions of themselves! Currently we know for sure that PiMon can upgrade up to Version 4.0. But there's reason to believe that they can update even further!

So, hope you will join us in discovering more about PiMon, Admin!
